description: CompositionBlack hooded jacket with purple and grey stripes, made of 100% acrylic, has a hood with a full length buttoned placket with big buttons, a belt round the waist and ribbed cuffs and hemlineFittingRegularWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild ironDo not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryBring back the vintage with a warm bang! Crawl into this warm woollen jacket from scullers over your regular attire and look great on any occasion. Use it either to camouflage your dress beneath or to simply show the jacket off. Don this and freak out in the chill this season enjoying the steaming hot street food with much pleasure.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in jacketsHeight: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
